WITH "seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210101
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210102
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210103
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210105
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID") AS "distinct_pseudo_users"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date") AS "month",
    SUM("transaction_revenue") AS "monthly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE YEAR("session_date") = 2017
  GROUP BY "source", DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date")
),
"yearly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "source",
    SUM("monthly_total_transaction_revenue") AS "yearly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "monthly_revenue"
  GROUP BY "source"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "source",
    "yearly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "yearly_revenue"
  ORDER BY "yearly_total_transaction_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  ts."source",
  ts."yearly_total_transaction_revenue",
  ROUND(
    (MAX(mr."monthly_total_transaction_revenue") - MIN(mr."monthly_total_transaction_revenue")) / 1000000,
    2
  ) AS "difference_in_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS ts
JOIN "monthly_revenue" AS mr
  ON ts."source" = mr."source"
GROUP BY ts."source", ts."yearly_total_transaction_revenue";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 105.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
),
"product_revenue_by_hit" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    COALESCE("p".VALUE:"productRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "h",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "h".VALUE:"product") AS "p"
  WHERE TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
    AND "s"."trafficSource":"source" IS NOT NULL
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_hit"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT "traffic_source", "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_product_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"daily_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "p"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("p"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "daily_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_hit" AS "p"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "p"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "p"."traffic_source", DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "p"."session_date")
),
"weekly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "p"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("p"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "weekly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_hit" AS "p"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "p"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "p"."traffic_source", DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "p"."session_date")
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "p"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("p"."product_revenue") / 1000000.0 AS "monthly_product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_hit" AS "p"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "p"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source"
  GROUP BY "p"."traffic_source", DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "p"."session_date")
)
SELECT
  "t"."traffic_source",
  "t"."total_product_revenue" / 1000000.0 AS "total_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("daily_product_revenue_millions") FROM "daily_revenue") AS "max_daily_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("weekly_product_revenue_millions") FROM "weekly_revenue") AS "max_weekly_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("monthly_product_revenue_millions") FROM "monthly_revenue") AS "max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "t";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored 95.0; executed successfully with 2 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-04-01' AND '2017-07-31'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-04-01' AND '2017-07-31'
),
"session_product_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    s."month",
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."pageviews",
    s."transactions",
    MAX(IFF(p.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)) AS "has_product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => h.value:"product") AS p
  GROUP BY
    s."month",
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."pageviews",
    s."transactions"
),
"classified_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN "transactions" >= 1 AND "has_product_revenue" = 1 THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN "transactions" IS NULL AND "has_product_revenue" = 0 THEN 'non-purchase'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS "purchase_group"
  FROM "session_product_revenue"
),
"visitor_month_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "purchase_group",
    "fullVisitorId",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "classified_sessions"
  WHERE "purchase_group" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "purchase_group",
    "fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "purchase_group",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "fullVisitorId") AS "visitor_count_distinct",
  SUM("pageviews_per_visitor") AS "total_pageviews",
  AVG("pageviews_per_visitor") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "visitor_month_pageviews"
GROUP BY
  "month",
  "purchase_group"
ORDER BY
  "month" ASC,
  "purchase_group" ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 95.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s)

WITH "july_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170715
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170726
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170727
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731
),
"products" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    p.value:"v2ProductName"::TEXT AS "productName",
    COALESCE(p.value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) AS "productQuantity"
  FROM "july_sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s."hits") AS h,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.value:"product") AS p
),
"youtube_buyers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "products"
  WHERE "productName" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
    AND "productQuantity" > 0
)
SELECT
  p."productName",
  SUM(p."productQuantity") AS "total_quantity_purchased"
FROM "products" AS p
INNER JOIN "youtube_buyers" AS y
  ON p."fullVisitorId" = y."fullVisitorId"
WHERE p."productName" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  AND p."productQuantity" > 0
GROUP BY p."productName"
ORDER BY "total_quantity_purchased" DESC
LIMIT 1
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored 105.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "visitStartTime",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "visitStartTime",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
"hit_rows" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitId",
    s."visitStartTime",
    h.value:"hitNumber"::NUMBER AS "hitNumber",
    h.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS "pagePath",
    h.value:"time"::NUMBER AS "hitTimeMs"
  FROM "sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING IS NOT NULL
),
"home_transitions" AS (
  SELECT
    h1."fullVisitorId",
    h1."visitId",
    h1."pagePath" AS "home_page",
    h2."pagePath" AS "next_page",
    (h2."hitTimeMs" - h1."hitTimeMs") / 1000 AS "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "hit_rows" AS h1
  JOIN "hit_rows" AS h2
    ON h1."fullVisitorId" = h2."fullVisitorId"
   AND h1."visitId" = h2."visitId"
   AND h2."hitNumber" = h1."hitNumber" + 1
  WHERE h1."pagePath" ILIKE '/home%'
)
SELECT
  "next_page",
  COUNT(*) AS "next_page_visits",
  MAX("time_on_home_seconds") AS "max_time_on_home_seconds"
FROM "home_transitions"
GROUP BY "next_page"
ORDER BY "next_page_visits" DESC, "next_page"
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    AND "totals":"pageviews" IS NOT NULL
),
"visitor_classification_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_total_pageviews"
  FROM "sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification"
),
"monthly_averages" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    AVG(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'purchase' THEN "visitor_total_pageviews" END) AS "avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor",
    AVG(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'non_purchase' THEN "visitor_total_pageviews" END) AS "avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_classification_pageviews"
  GROUP BY "month"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor",
  "avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "monthly_averages"
ORDER BY "month" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20161114
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170114
),
"user_first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"user_last_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "last_visit_date",
    "device_category" AS "last_visit_device"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      "fullVisitorId",
      "session_date",
      "device_category",
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId" ORDER BY "session_date" DESC) AS "rn"
    FROM "all_sessions"
  ) AS "x"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
),
"user_first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "first_transaction_date",
    "device_category" AS "first_transaction_device"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      "fullVisitorId",
      "session_date",
      "device_category",
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId" ORDER BY "session_date" ASC) AS "rn"
    FROM "all_sessions"
    WHERE "transactions" > 0
  ) AS "x"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
),
"user_last_recorded_event" AS (
  SELECT
    fv."fullVisitorId",
    fv."first_visit_date",
    lv."last_visit_date",
    ft."first_transaction_date",
    CASE
      WHEN ft."first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL
           AND ft."first_transaction_date" >= lv."last_visit_date"
        THEN ft."first_transaction_date"
      ELSE lv."last_visit_date"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_date",
    CASE
      WHEN ft."first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL
           AND ft."first_transaction_date" >= lv."last_visit_date"
        THEN ft."first_transaction_device"
      ELSE lv."last_visit_device"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_device"
  FROM "user_first_visit" AS fv
  INNER JOIN "user_last_visit" AS lv
    ON fv."fullVisitorId" = lv."fullVisitorId"
  LEFT JOIN "user_first_transaction" AS ft
    ON fv."fullVisitorId" = ft."fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "fullVisitorId",
  "first_visit_date",
  "last_recorded_event_date",
  DATEDIFF('day', "first_visit_date", "last_recorded_event_date") AS "days_between_events"
FROM "user_last_recorded_event"
WHERE "last_recorded_event_device" = 'mobile'
ORDER BY "days_between_events" DESC
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-03-31')
),
"hit_events" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "session_date") AS "month",
    "h".value:"page":"pagePath"::TEXT AS "pagePath",
    "h".value:"eCommerceAction":"action_type"::TEXT AS "actionType"
  FROM "sessions",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hits") AS "h"
),
"monthly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    COUNT_IF("pagePath" ILIKE '%product%') AS "product_detail_pageviews",
    COUNT_IF("actionType" = '2') AS "add_to_cart_events",
    COUNT_IF("actionType" = '6') AS "purchase_events"
  FROM "hit_events"
  GROUP BY "month"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "product_detail_pageviews",
  "add_to_cart_events",
  "purchase_events",
  ("add_to_cart_events" * 100.0) / NULLIF("product_detail_pageviews", 0) AS "add_to_cart_conversion_rate",
  ("purchase_events" * 100.0) / NULLIF("product_detail_pageviews", 0) AS "purchase_conversion_rate"
FROM "monthly_counts"
ORDER BY "month" ASC

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "visitNumber",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "visitNumber",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "visitNumber",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "visitNumber",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"initial_visits" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "visitNumber",
    COALESCE("totals":"timeOnSite"::NUMBER, 0) AS "time_on_site"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "session_date" BETWEEN DATE '2016-08-01' AND DATE '2017-04-30'
    AND "visitNumber" = 1
),
"subsequent_purchasers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  INNER JOIN "initial_visits" AS i
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = i."fullVisitorId"
  WHERE s."visitNumber" > 1
    AND s."session_date" > i."session_date"
    AND COALESCE(s."totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"counts" AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT i."fullVisitorId") AS "total_new_users",
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN i."time_on_site" > 300 AND p."fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL THEN i."fullVisitorId"
    END) AS "qualified_new_users"
  FROM "initial_visits" AS i
  LEFT JOIN "subsequent_purchasers" AS p
    ON i."fullVisitorId" = p."fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "total_new_users",
  "qualified_new_users",
  100.0 * "qualified_new_users" / NULLIF("total_new_users", 0) AS "qualified_user_percentage"
FROM "counts";

WITH "patents_with_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR((YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) - 1960) / 5) AS "period_index",
    "publication_number",
    ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") AS "inventor_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "publication_date" >= 19600101
    AND "publication_date" <= 20201231
    AND "inventor" IS NOT NULL
    AND ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") > 0
),
"aggregated" AS (
  SELECT
    "period_index",
    AVG("inventor_count") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
    COUNT("publication_number") AS "total_patent_publications"
  FROM "patents_with_counts"
  GROUP BY "period_index"
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(
    TO_VARCHAR(1960 + ("period_index" * 5)),
    '-',
    TO_VARCHAR(1964 + ("period_index" * 5))
  ) AS "5_year_period",
  "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  "total_patent_publications"
FROM "aggregated"
ORDER BY "period_index" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 95.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s)

final_sql:
WITH "cpc_matches" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    p."country_code",
    p."assignee_harmonized":"name"::STRING AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."cpc") AS c
  WHERE c.value:"code"::STRING LIKE 'A61%'
    AND p."assignee_harmonized":"name"::STRING IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "cpc_matches"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT "assignee_name"
  FROM "assignee_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "assignee_name") = 1
),
"jurisdiction_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    c."assignee_name",
    c."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT c."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "cpc_matches" AS c
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS t
    ON c."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY c."assignee_name", c."country_code"
),
"ranked_jurisdictions" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "country_code",
    "patent_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "assignee_name" ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") AS "rn"
  FROM "jurisdiction_counts"
)
SELECT
  "assignee_name",
  LISTAGG("country_code", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") AS "top_five_jurisdictions"
FROM "ranked_jurisdictions"
WHERE "rn" <= 5
GROUP BY "assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored 85.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "application_number",
    "filing_date",
    "assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT AS "assignee_name",
    "uspc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "uspc"::TEXT ILIKE '%A61%'
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  WHERE "assignee_name" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  WHERE "assignee_name" = (SELECT "assignee_name" FROM "top_assignee")
    AND "filing_date" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  YEAR("filing_year") AS "year",
  "application_count"
FROM "assignee_year_counts"
ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "year"
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 85.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH "assignee_apps" AS (
  SELECT
    f.value::STRING AS "cpc_code",
    p."application_number" AS "application_number",
    p."country_code" AS "country_code",
    p."assignee_harmonized" AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."assignee_harmonized") AS a,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."assignee") AS f
  WHERE f.value::STRING = 'A01B3'
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "total_applications"
  FROM "assignee_apps"
  WHERE "assignee_name" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_3_assignees" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "total_applications"
  FROM "assignee_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_applications" DESC, "assignee_name") <= 3
),
"yearly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4) || '-01-01')) AS "application_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") AS "applications_in_year"
  FROM "assignee_apps" AS a
  INNER JOIN "top_3_assignees" AS t
    ON a."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4) || '-01-01') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4) || '-01-01'))
),
"top_year_per_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "applications_in_year"
  FROM "yearly_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name"
    ORDER BY "applications_in_year" DESC, "application_year"
  ) = 1
),
"country_counts_in_top_year" AS (
  SELECT
    a."assignee_name",
    y."application_year",
    a."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") AS "country_applications"
  FROM "assignee_apps" AS a
  INNER JOIN "top_year_per_assignee" AS y
    ON a."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
   AND DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a."application_number", 1, 4) || '-01-01')) = y."application_year"
  GROUP BY
    a."assignee_name",
    y."application_year",
    a."country_code"
),
"top_country_per_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "country_code"
  FROM "country_counts_in_top_year"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name", "application_year"
    ORDER BY "country_applications" DESC, "country_code"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  t."assignee_name",
  t."total_applications",
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM y."application_year") AS "year_with_most_applications",
  y."applications_in_year",
  c."country_code" AS "top_country_code_in_top_year"
FROM "top_3_assignees" AS t
INNER JOIN "top_year_per_assignee" AS y
  ON t."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
INNER JOIN "top_country_per_assignee" AS c
  ON y."assignee_name" = c."assignee_name"
 AND y."application_year" = c."application_year"
ORDER BY t."total_applications" DESC, t."assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 85.0; executed successfully with 1 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

WITH "months" AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), TO_DATE('2008-01-01')) AS "month_start"
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_filings" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(p."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month_start",
    COUNT(*) AS "filing_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."abstract_localized") AS a
  WHERE p."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND p."filing_date" >= 20080101
    AND p."filing_date" <= 20221231
    AND a.value:"text"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(p."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  m."month_start",
  COALESCE(f."filing_count", 0) AS "filing_count"
FROM "months" AS m
LEFT JOIN "iot_filings" AS f
  ON m."month_start" = f."month_start"
ORDER BY m."month_start" ASC

WITH "granted_2010_utility" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "application_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_dt"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "application_kind" = 'utility'
    AND "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20101231
    AND "filing_date" IS NOT NULL
),
"forward_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    g."publication_number",
    g."application_number",
    COUNT(DISTINCT p."application_number") AS "forward_citation_count"
  FROM "granted_2010_utility" AS g
  JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
    ON p."citation" IS NOT NULL
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."citation") AS f
  WHERE f.value:"publication_number"::TEXT = g."publication_number"
    AND p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= g."filing_dt"
    AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATEADD(YEAR, 10, g."filing_dt")
  GROUP BY
    g."publication_number",
    g."application_number"
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "utility_patent_count"
FROM "forward_citations"
WHERE "forward_citation_count" = 1;

WITH "granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" >= 20100101
    AND "grant_date" <= 20181231
),
"sea_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    "pub_cleaned",
    COUNT(*) AS "backward_citations_sea_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13
  WHERE "standard" = 'SEA'
  GROUP BY "pub_cleaned"
)
SELECT
  gp."publication_number",
  COALESCE(sc."backward_citations_sea_count", 0) AS "backward_citations_sea_count"
FROM "granted_patents" AS gp
LEFT JOIN "sea_citations" AS sc
  ON gp."publication_number" = sc."pub_cleaned"
ORDER BY gp."publication_number" ASC

WITH "granted_cn_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "family_id",
    "application_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_kind" ILIKE '%grant%'
    AND "application_number_formatted" ILIKE 'CN%'
    AND TO_DATE("parent":"grantDate"::STRING) >= '2010-01-01'
    AND TO_DATE("parent":"grantDate"::STRING) <= '2023-12-31'
),
"family_application_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "family_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "distinct_applications_per_family"
  FROM "granted_cn_patents"
  GROUP BY "family_id"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") > 1
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "patent_count"
FROM "granted_cn_patents" AS "g"
INNER JOIN "family_application_counts" AS "f"
  ON "g"."family_id" = "f"."family_id";

    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'US'
    AND "kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND (
      "publication_number" ILIKE '%202206%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE '%202207%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE '%202208%'
    )
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    LEFT(f.value::STRING, 4) AS "ipc_4digit",
    "publication_number"

  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "ipc") AS f
  WHERE f.value IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  "ipc_4digit",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "ipc_codes"
WHERE LENGTH("ipc_4digit") = 4
GROUP BY "ipc_4digit"
ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH "filtered_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'US'
    AND "kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND "application_kind" = 'UTILITY'
    AND "publication_date" BETWEEN 20220601 AND 20220930
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    fp."publication_number",
    SUBSTR(f.value:"code"::TEXT, 1, 4) AS "ipc4"
  FROM "filtered_publications" AS fp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => fp."ipc") AS f
  WHERE f.value:"code" IS NOT NULL
),
"ipc4_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_count"
  FROM "ipc_codes"
  WHERE "ipc4" IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH("ipc4") = 4
  GROUP BY
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4"
),
"ranked_ipc4" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    "ipc4_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "publication_number"
      ORDER BY "ipc4_count" DESC, "ipc4" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "ipc4_counts"
)
SELECT
  "publication_number",
  "ipc4"
FROM "ranked_ipc4"
WHERE "rn" = 1
  AND "ipc4_count" >= 10
ORDER BY
  "publication_number" ASC,
  "ipc4" ASC;

final_sql:
WITH "us_b2_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_dt",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_month",
    YEAR(TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    a."cited_by",
    a."similar"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON p."publication_number" = a."publication_number"
  WHERE p."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%B2'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2014-12-31'
),
"citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    u."publication_number",
    u."filing_dt",
    u."filing_month",
    u."filing_year",
    COUNT(*) AS "forward_citations_within_1_month"
  FROM "us_b2_patents" AS u
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => u."cited_by") AS cb
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(cb.value:"date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= u."filing_dt"
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(cb.value:"date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, u."filing_dt")
  GROUP BY
    u."publication_number",
    u."filing_dt",
    u."filing_month",
    u."filing_year"
),
"top_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    c."publication_number",
    c."filing_dt",
    c."filing_month",
    c."filing_year",
    c."forward_citations_within_1_month"
  FROM "citation_counts" AS c
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY c."forward_citations_within_1_month" DESC, c."publication_number"
  ) = 1
),
"similar_candidates" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    t."filing_year",
    s.value::STRING AS "similar_publication_number",
    s.index AS "similar_rank"
  FROM "top_patent" AS t
  INNER JOIN "us_b2_patents" AS u
    ON t."publication_number" = u."publication_number"
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => u."similar") AS s
),
"same_year_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    sc."target_publication_number",
    sc."similar_publication_number",
    sc."similar_rank",
    p2."publication_number" AS "matched_publication_number",
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "matched_filing_dt"
  FROM "similar_candidates" AS sc
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON p2."publication_number" = sc."similar_publication_number"
  WHERE YEAR(TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) = sc."filing_year"
),
"top_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    s."target_publication_number",
    s."matched_publication_number" AS "most_similar_same_filing_year"
  FROM "same_year_similar" AS s
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY s."target_publication_number"
    ORDER BY s."similar_rank", s."matched_publication_number"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  t."publication_number",
  t."filing_dt",
  t."filing_month",
  t."forward_citations_within_1_month",
  ts."most_similar_same_filing_year"
FROM "top_patent" AS t
LEFT JOIN "top_similar" AS ts
  ON t."publication_number" = ts."target_publication_number";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 75.0; executed successfully with 2 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0
